title: NS Vortex Stretching and EML-3 v2

analysis.object: T526: NS Vortex Stretching and EML-3 v2 depth analysis

stretching_term.description: omega*grad(u) is vortex stretching; absent in 2D, present in 3D
stretching_term.reason: Stretching term is EML-3 tensor product; projects to EML-inf in blow-up

two_d_absence.description: 2D NS regular because vortex stretching = 0 in 2D; depth ceiling = EML-3
two_d_absence.reason: Without stretching, vorticity stays bounded; EML-3 ceiling holds

three_d_blowup.description: 3D stretching can trigger EML-inf cascade; single mechanism for inaccessibility
three_d_blowup.reason: Stretching is the physical categorification mechanism in 3D fluids

analysis.theorem: T526: NS Vortex Stretching and EML-3 v2 (S805).

key_theorem: T526: NS Vortex Stretching and EML-3 v2 (S805).
